一関市水田高収益作物転換特別支援事業交付金
令和7年度一関市農商工連携開発事業費補助金
多面的機能支払交付金

field_normalization: Normalize Unicode with NFKC, collapse whitespace, strip zero-width and control characters.
Canonicalize URLs by lowercasing scheme/host, removing tracking query params, preserving PDF/doc path and meaningful fragments separately.
Convert amount_max_man_yen and amount_min_man_yen to integer yen before comparison.
Normalize subsidy_rate to decimal max rate; do not diff display forms such as 1/2 vs 0.5.
Parse application_window_json into start_date/end_date/status/fiscal_year/round/cycle and compare typed fields, not raw JSON order.
Sort and de-duplicate target_types/funding_purpose arrays before hashing.
For laws, compare law_number, law_title, enforced_date, last_amended_date, revision_status, and source_checksum separately from fetched_at.
For HTML/PDF text, strip boilerplate zones before low-level difflib: footer/contact/nav/cookie/accessibility/sidebar/breadcrumb/script/style.

snapshot_cycle_recommendation.open_or_near_deadline_tier_s: daily while status=open or application_window end_date is present/current; compare typed fields first
snapshot_cycle_recommendation.stable_open_ended_loan_tax_pages: weekly content hash plus typed field check
snapshot_cycle_recommendation.e_gov_laws: weekly catalog checksum, immediate candidate if last_amended_date or revision_status differs
snapshot_cycle_recommendation.broken_sources: retry with backoff and keep 3-strike quarantine evidence separate from business diff
snapshot_cycle_recommendation.missing_checksum_rows: prioritize checksum backfill before declaring field diff

false_positive_taxonomy.symptoms: 電話番号、所在地、組織改編、SNS/footer link changes
false_positive_taxonomy.mitigation: zone-strip footer/contact/nav before text hash; keep contact as low-signal auxiliary field

false_positive_taxonomy.symptoms: 現在時刻、最終表示日時、access counter、cache bust query
false_positive_taxonomy.mitigation: regex remove timestamps/counters; compare business dates only after label whitelist

false_positive_taxonomy.symptoms: FAQ、Q&A、お知らせ一覧の順序だけ変わる
false_positive_taxonomy.mitigation: section item hashing with sorted stable keys; flag only add/remove/changed item bodies

false_positive_taxonomy.symptoms: ページ番号、ヘッダ/フッタ、改ページ位置の違い
false_positive_taxonomy.mitigation: drop page headers/footers and page-number-only lines before text hash

false_positive_taxonomy.symptoms: て・に・を・は、句読点、全半角、令和/西暦併記の揺れ
false_positive_taxonomy.mitigation: NFKC + token-level similarity; suppress if high-signal fields unchanged

false_positive_taxonomy.symptoms: 公募一覧ページで他制度の追加が混ざる
false_positive_taxonomy.mitigation: program-specific heading window extraction; fallback to source URL detail page or attachment

shard_false_positive_focus: aggregate taxonomy and schema suggestions; final integration file intentionally untouched
Coordinator output only. Per user instruction, analysis_wave18/am_diff_design_2026-04-30.md was not written.

critical: source_url became broken after prior live
low: page date changed with no business field change

blockers: No prior data/snapshots/am_diff_* source-byte baseline exists in this checkout, so all shard JSON files are baseline_only.
am_amendment_diff has 0 rows; current diff behavior cannot be validated against accepted prior diffs.
Tier S has 13 broken source URLs (11x404, 2x403) and 50 rows missing source_checksum.
program_law_refs is empty, so program-to-law amendment impact cannot yet be joined from local tables.
data/autonomath.db is 0 bytes; the populated amendment/source DB used for read-only evidence is /Users/shigetoumeda/jpcite/autonomath.db.
suggested_next_queries: SELECT unified_id, primary_name, source_url FROM programs WHERE tier='S' AND excluded=0 AND (source_checksum IS NULL OR source_checksum='') AND source_url_status='live' ORDER BY primary_name;

SELECT unified_id, primary_name, source_url, source_last_check_status, source_fail_count FROM programs WHERE tier='S' AND excluded=0 AND source_url_status='broken' ORDER BY source_last_check_status, primary_name;
WITH paired AS (...) SELECT entity_id FROM paired WHERE eligibility_hash unchanged AND summary_hash unchanged AND high-signal typed fields changed;
SELECT unified_id, law_title, last_amended_date, revision_status, source_checksum FROM laws ORDER BY last_amended_date DESC LIMIT 100;
SELECT source_url, COUNT(*) FROM programs WHERE tier='S' AND excluded=0 GROUP BY source_url HAVING COUNT(*)>1;
